name: Minimal SU(5) GUT
summary: Embeds SU(3) x SU(2) x U(1) into a single SU(5) gauge group at high energy ~ 10^15 GeV. SM matter fits into 10 + 5-bar of SU(5); spontaneous breaking via 24-Higgs gives SM gauge structure at low energies. The minimal nonsupersymmetric version is excluded by proton-decay searches; SUSY-SU(5) and split versions remain viable.

addresses_puzzles.note: Non-SUSY SU(5) running misses unification by ~few sigma; SUSY-SU(5) closes it. Listed as ameliorates with disfavored confidence for the minimal version.
Quark and charged-lepton masses are related at the GUT scale (m_b = m_tau, m_s = m_mu / 3, m_d = 3 m_e at unification); partial success for third generation.

touches_benchmarks.note: Minimal non-SUSY SU(5) predicts p -> e+ pi^0 lifetime ~ 10^31 - 10^32 yr, well below Super-K's 10^34 yr bound. Excluded.

introduces.note: GUT scale, 24-Higgs potential parameters, doublet-triplet splitting parameter.

history: Georgi-Glashow (1974). Excluded by IMB and Super-K proton-decay searches by ~1990s. SUSY-SU(5) (Dimopoulos-Raby-Wilczek 1981) is the surviving version, currently constrained by Super-K dimension-5 operator searches.

references.citation: Georgi and Glashow, 'Unity of all elementary-particle forces', PRL 32, 438 (1974)
